title: Modular Machinery Reborn
description: Modular Machinery Reborn port of the original Modular Machinery for 1.12.2
body:
A modpack-maker toolset to create custom, massive, unique and complex machines and recipes from scratch with JSON or KubeJS.

 

The mod includes decorative casings and tiered, configurable tiers of item/fluid/energy input/output buses/hatches to allow for the creation of big multiblock machinery like Gregtech's Implosion Compressor, Vacuum Freezer, ... and whatever you might imagine.

 

The mod is intended as toolset for modpack makers and not meant to be just thrown into a pack and not modified at all. Adjust/Add/Remove recipes and machines to fit the pack you're creating!

 

This mod has also compat with KubeJS to create the recipes.

This mod needs a datapack loader to load the machines and recipe json

 

Discord : For questions or support, join the Discord Server : https://discord.gg/2XCPCVa59h

 

You can see the Test Datapack for example machines and recipe json.

You can see the Test KubeJS server script for example machine and recipe using kubejs

 

Original author: HellFirePvP
